---
name: 🚀 Feature Request
about: Suggest an idea or architectural improvement for this project
title: '[FEAT]: '
labels: enhancement
assignees: ''
---

## 🎯 Problem Statement
Is your feature request related to a problem? Please describe clearly (e.g., "We only track paths, but business owners need full URLs").

## 💡 Proposed Solution
A clear and concise description of what you want to happen.

## 🛠️ Technical Implementation Steps
If you have an architectural approach in mind, sketch it out here:
1. Script changes
2. Schema updates
3. API route modifications

## ✅ Acceptance Criteria
What must be true for this issue to be safely marked as completed?
